message:
fix(wizer): Use simpler wasm_runtime_init() to avoid Linux crash

Switch from wasm_runtime_full_init() with init_args to the simpler
wasm_runtime_init() function. This avoids potential struct layout
issues on Linux x86_64 that may be causing silent crashes during
WAMR initialization.

The simpler init uses system allocator by default and doesn't require
passing a RuntimeInitArgs struct.
